programmes.show_description: Drama series. Allie tries to kill Ferguson. Franky makes another escape attempt. Will and Kaz join forces to stop the drug trafficking. Doreen gets a wonderful surprise.

Drama series. Franky discovers who killed Mike Pennisi but ends up in even greater trouble when Ferguson intervenes. Channing sidelines Vera after investigating Jake.

programmes.show_description: Formerly light cruiser USS Phoenix but sold to Argentinia after World War II, the renamed General Belgrano was controversially torpedoed during the Falklands Conflict.

programmes.show_name: Sunken Warships: Secrets from the Deep
programmes.show_description: HMS Exeter has become synonymous with bravery and sacrifice but her luck didn't last. Severely damaged by an enemy shell, she was sunk in shark-infested waters.

programmes.show_name: The Most Embarrassing Game Show Moments
programmes.show_description: A romp through toe-curling clips, from ludicrous answers on favourite quizzes like Family Fortunes to sheer red-face embarrassment on Saturday night's top dating shows.

programmes.show_description: Rob and Ruth head back to wartime London to uncover how the Blitz was experienced by the rich and the poor. As the bombs rained down did your place in society keep you safe?
